card1.justWantedToSay: We just wanted to tell you:
card1.gladYoureWithUs: Great to have you with us in the campaign, we trust you very much!
card1.firstToEnterText: Wow, so fast! Keep it up and we'll reach our goal quickly!
card1.firstToFinishSurveyText: You're so fast! Such efficiency will make the campaign a success!
card1.fastestSurveyText: With such sharpness and efficiency, the campaign is going to be a huge success!
card1.highestExpectationText: Your commitment to the campaign is amazing and will lead us to success!
card1.firstToFinishAllText: You're sharp and goal-oriented! That's exactly what we need in this campaign!

card1.aboveTargetText: You managed to raise much more than the goal you set for yourself, you're amazing!

card1.noWordsText: Your activity here at unusual hours deserves special appreciation!

questionnaireSettings.styleSelector: Which questionnaire style fits your community?
questionnaireSettings.thinkingAboutDonors: When you think about each of your donors,
questionnaireSettings.faq1Question: What is a Traffic Light Questionnaire?
questionnaireSettings.faq1Answer: After you click the button, the Traffic Light Questionnaire will be sent to each of the fundraisers, who will answer the series of questions about the donors assigned to them.
questionnaireSettings.faq2Answer: The answers will give you and us a better understanding of each donor and their connection with the fundraiser, the community, and the campaign goal. This way we can improve assignments and refine preparations for the actual fundraising.
questionnaireSettings.faq3Answer: The questionnaire is designed and written in a smart and precise way to get reliable and accurate answers. To fine-tune its fit for the fundraisers, it is phrased in 3 styles, and you can choose the wording with the most appropriate character for your community.
questionnaireSettings.faq4Question: What will we see in the results?
questionnaireSettings.faq4Answer: Wow, a lot! The results will reveal which donors are connected to the community, connected to the fundraiser, have potential to donate a lot, to donate quickly, and more.
questionnaireSettings.faq5Question: What to do to maximize the benefit from the questionnaire?
questionnaireSettings.faq5Answer: Send the questionnaire early enough before the fundraising, make sure all fundraisers understood it and answered, and thoroughly analyze the results to draw quality conclusions for moving forward.
questionnaireSettings.faq6Answer: To help you raise much more money, we prepared our 'Million Questionnaire'. You send the questionnaire with one click to all your fundraisers, each fundraiser fills it out individually - regarding their donors. The questionnaire is experiential, you can see for yourself. Here at this stage you can choose which style and tone to use with the fundraisers. You can also see here the questions and the characters that accompany them.
questionnaireSettings.selectFundraisersTitle: Select the fundraisers to send the message to
questionnaireSettings.sentLink: Did we send them a link?
questionnaireSettings.goBackChoose: Go back, I want to choose something else

donorForecast.welcomeTitle: Welcome to our smart forecast process!
donorForecast.welcomeIntro: Let's embark on a smart and fun journey to define our success in the campaign.
donorForecast.welcomeExplain: We'll show you the donation ranks that are requested from the public to donate in the campaign, and for each rank you'll define who is capable of donating such an amount.
donorForecast.welcomeNotAsking: We're not asking right now how much you can fundraise from them,
donorForecast.welcomeButWhether: but whether you think they are capable of donating this amount.
donorForecast.welcomeNote: Note: When you advance to the next rank, there's no way to go back to the previous one!
donorForecast.pleaseWaitLoading: Please wait while we load your donor list
donorForecast.noDonorsFound: No donors assigned to this fundraiser.
donorForecast.addDonorsForForecast: Please add donors to the fundraiser to use the smart forecast process.
donorForecast.alreadyCompletedTitle: You've already completed the forecast process
donorForecast.alreadyCompletedMessage: Your forecast process has already been completed successfully.
donorForecast.ratingsAndEstimatesSaved: Your ratings and estimates have been saved in the system.
donorForecast.ifWantToSeeBreakdown: If you want to see the full breakdown of your donors, use the button below.
donorForecast.notFilledQuestionnaire: Haven't filled out the questionnaire yet? You can fill it now or see your donors' breakdown.
donorForecast.greatToHaveYou: Great to have you with us :)
donorForecast.chooseDonorsWithAbility: Choose from the names in the list, who do you think has the ability to donate:
donorForecast.chooseDonorsMonthly: Choose from the names in the list, who do you think has the ability to donate monthly:
donorForecast.scrollValidation: *Wait a moment, you haven't scrolled to the bottom...
donorForecast.whileTimerRunning: But while the timer is running, take another look - maybe you'll find someone?
donorForecast.finishChoosingNames: Just finish choosing all the names and we'll continue, okay?
donorForecast.emptyRegret: It's perfectly fine to change your mind :)
donorForecast.emptyRegretSubtitle: But don't give up easily, this stage is critical for the success of the entire campaign!
donorForecast.emptyStage1Title: Click or drag the names you choose here.
donorForecast.emptyStage1Subtitle: Come on, we're curious to see the first name...
donorForecast.emptyStage2HasDonors: You haven't chosen donors in this rank yet.
donorForecast.emptyStage2HasDonorsSubtitle: Interesting to see who you'll choose here...
donorForecast.emptyStage2NoDonors: We have no doubt you'll find someone now!
donorForecast.emptyStage2NoDonorsSubtitle: Come on - drag here or click on the appropriate name, the first one that comes to mind!
donorForecast.emptyStage3HasDonors: Come on! You already know how to do this!
donorForecast.emptyStage3HasDonorsSubtitle: We're excited to see who you'll add to this rank...
donorForecast.emptyStage3NoDonors: Every name you choose here will greatly impact the campaign's success!
donorForecast.emptySecondToLastSubtitle: What's the first name that pops up?
donorForecast.emptySecondToLastNoDonors: Well, this is almost the last chance.
donorForecast.emptySecondToLastNoDonorsSubtitle: There's no way you won't find any name here, come on! The campaign's success depends on it!
donorForecast.emptyLastHasDonors: Yes, just choose or move here whoever's left :)
donorForecast.emptyLastHasDonorsSubtitle: No, you can't leave names outside...
donorForecast.emptyLastNoDonors: You haven't chosen any donor yet,
donorForecast.emptyLastNoDonorsSubtitle: so just choose or move all the names here.
donorForecast.emptyDefaultHasDonors: Come on! You already know how to do this!
donorForecast.emptyDefaultHasDonorsSubtitle: We're excited to see who you'll add to this rank...
donorForecast.emptyDefaultNoDonors: Every name you choose here will greatly impact the campaign's success!
donorForecast.resetPopupTitle: We're at advanced stages and you still haven't chosen anyone, so we just wanted to make sure:
donorForecast.resetQuestion1: Did you understand that the questions are not:
donorForecast.resetQuestion1Detail: how much you can get from them,
donorForecast.resetQuestion1Target: how much they can donate in general?
donorForecast.resetOkFromStart: Ahh okay, so from the start
donorForecast.resetStillNotFound: Yes, and I still haven't found anyone
donorForecast.resetNowGoBack: Now we'll go back to the beginning and you'll choose the names again.
donorForecast.resetQuestion2: Do you understand that your opinion is important and influential,
donorForecast.resetQuestion2Detail: your forecast choices here can lower the total donations in the entire campaign?
donorForecast.resetIfSureWithYou: if you're sure, we're with you!
donorForecast.noDonorsPopupStatText: succeed in finding at least one name in this rank.
donorForecast.noDonorsPopupBottom: And yes, most of them also clicked 'Seems like there's no one' and after another look suddenly managed to think of a name. It's possible!
donorForecast.noDonorsPopupOk: Okay, I'll take another look too!
donorForecast.oneDonorPopupTitle: Stop everything, listen for a moment!
donorForecast.oneDonorPopupStat: In 90% of cases, if you found one donor at this amount, there's another one here.
donorForecast.oneDonorPopupDesc: We're at the highest ranks of the campaign, every donor here is worth a lot and every additional name significantly impacts the success of the entire campaign!
donorForecast.oneDonorPopupNoMore: Come on, I'm telling you there's no more
donorForecast.rankHeaderLastNoDonors: That's it, we've reached the lowest amount rank.
donorForecast.rankHeaderLastWithDonors: That's it, we've reached the lowest rank!
donorForecast.rankHeaderAdvanced: We've reached a really advanced stage!
donorForecast.buttonRestDontFit: That's it, the rest don't fit
donorForecast.finishHighTitle: Wow! You finished with amazing success!
donorForecast.finishHighDesc: You did an excellent and fast job, you identified the potential of your donors in an exceptional way and you are about to fundraise for the campaign:
donorForecast.finishMediumDesc: You did an excellent and fast job, you identified the potential of your donors and you are about to fundraise for the campaign:
donorForecast.finishLowDesc: Based on the potential you identified and the donation forecast you chose for your donors, you are about to fundraise for the campaign
donorForecast.finishWhatItMeans: What does this say about you?
donorForecast.finishHighMeaning: That you're a true fundraising pro, connected and full of motivation to achieve the shared goal, getting things done and an especially valuable asset to our campaign!
donorForecast.finishMediumMeaning: Getting things done and an important asset to our campaign's success! That you're thorough, do things in depth, full of motivation,
donorForecast.finishLowMeaning: That you're thorough, with original thinking and solid opinions.
donorForecast.finishButtonQuestionnaire: Shall we continue to the donor rating questionnaire?
donorForecast.finishButtonFirstDonation: Shall we go create your first donation?
donorForecast.finishButtonViewDonors: Shall we go see your donors?

hero.subtitle: The operating system that makes every campaign predictable, measurable, and profitable. Don't lose 40% of your potential — switch to Predictive Philanthropy management.
hero.cta: Discover where your money is hiding

roiCalc.title: How much money are you leaving on the floor?
roiCalc.inputLabel: How much did you raise in your last campaign?
roiCalc.resultIntro: Did you know? Based on DoNext performance averages, the potential you didn't utilize is:
roiCalc.closing: We don't cost money, we return the money you're currently losing.

checklist.title: Are you suffering from the "Black Hole"?
checklist.subtitle: Check — does any of this sound familiar?
checklist.q1: Do you only find out you're short on money in the last two days of the campaign?
checklist.q2: Do your fundraisers feel they have "no one to turn to" and start burning out?
checklist.q3: Is your goal set based on the organization's needs rather than field potential?
checklist.result: If you answered "yes" to even one — you're not managing the campaign, it's managing you.

comparison.title: The Old World vs. DoNext Standard
comparison.subtitle: The gap between traditional management and smart management

r1.old: History: Shows what was already donated.
r1.donext: Future: Predicts what will be donated and where the risk is.

r2.donext: Action engine: Strategic advisor guiding execution.

r4.old: Gut feeling: "I think we'll reach the goal."

r5.donext: Maximum use: Flagging forgotten donors in real-time.

solution.title: The Holy Trinity — Calm, Precision & Confidence
solution.subtitle: Each role gets exactly what they need

s1.title: Peace of Mind
s1.desc: Real-time anomaly dashboard. The system monitors activity and alerts only when you're needed. Sleep well — data has your back.

s2.title: Precision
s2.desc: Smart prediction engine (Bottom-Up). Build a solid financial forecast based on probabilities and field data — before the campaign even starts.

s3.title: Self-Confidence
s3.desc: A "Waze" app for fundraising. Transforms fundraisers into professional salespeople working with a clear roadmap and peak motivation.

trafficLight.title: Traffic Light Questionnaire — AI That Knows Who to Call
trafficLight.desc: Our AI algorithm analyzes 4 depth metrics: financial capacity, personal closeness, influence level and mental readiness. The result: the system tells you exactly who to talk to now, and about how much.

dataAsset.title: Your Strategic CRM
dataAsset.desc: DoNext isn't just for campaigns — it's your organizational memory.
dataAsset.content: Every campaign feeds the system with psychological ratings and donor intel. Over time, DoNext becomes the smart CRM of your organization, so your next campaign always starts from a much higher starting point.

founder.quote: I built DoNext because I saw too many leaders with huge hearts collapsing under the management burden. Our technology is designed to free you to make your impact, while data watches your back and ensures you reach the goal.
founder.name: Avraham Yosef Prester

features.title: The tools that will transform your fundraising
features.subtitle: Everything your organization needs to raise more, faster, and smarter

dashboard.title: Real-time Dashboard
dashboard.desc: See exactly where your campaign stands — how much raised, how many donors, where to push. All live.

payments.title: Automatic Collection
payments.desc: Stripe, standing orders, credit cards — donors choose how to pay, you simply receive. Zero friction.

donors.title: Full Donor CRM
donors.desc: Donor profiles with full history, commitments, notes, and segmentation — know exactly who to reach and when.

mobile.title: Access From Any Device
mobile.desc: An interface that works from mobile just like desktop — manage fundraisers, view data, and get alerts on the go.

analytics.title: Reports That Drive Decisions
analytics.desc: Not just charts — reports that help you understand what's working, what's not, and where the next opportunity is.

integrations.title: Connect All Your Systems
integrations.desc: Pledger, Bevel, Matbia, OJC — seamless integration with systems you already use, zero manual work.

howItWorks.title: From signup to fundraising in 4 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple process that takes minutes — and you'll start seeing results

step1.title: Open a free account
step1.desc: Sign up in one minute. No credit card, no commitment.

step2.title: Build your campaign
step2.desc: Set a goal, design your donation page, connect payment methods — and your campaign is live.

step3.title: Recruit your team
step3.desc: Add fundraisers, import donor lists, and create a working team that will drive the fundraising.

step4.title: Track & Succeed
step4.desc: Track in real time, get automatic alerts, and manage your campaign perfectly from anywhere.

t1.text: We went from 'firefighting' management to precision business management. We reached 140% of our goal.
t1.name: Fundraising Manager

t2.text: The peace of mind knowing two weeks before the campaign how much money will come in is irreplaceable.
t2.name: Organization Director

t3.text: The gamification in the app made our fundraisers fight for every donation with joy.
t3.name: Fundraiser Manager

t4.text: DoNext isn't software, it's strategy in a box. It prevented us from wasting time on 'red' donors.
t4.name: Fundraising Advisor

q1.a: Initially, DoNext layers on top of your data as an intelligence layer. Over time, as strategic data accumulates, it becomes your organization's central and smartest CRM.

q2.a: Not at all. The system was built specifically for non-technical users. It's simple, intuitive, and warm.

q3.a: As early as possible. The sooner you begin the prediction and scoring process, the higher your certainty level and the lower your stress.

about.title: Born from the problem — built as the solution
about.desc: DoNext was created when we saw that the Israeli market lacked a modern fundraising tool that truly understands local needs. We built a platform that combines advanced technology with deep understanding of the community — so every organization can raise more with less effort.
about.cardText: The fundraising market in Israel is worth ~500M NIS per year. We're here to help you take your share.

cta.title: Let's close the black hole in your donation management
cta.subtitle: Organizations that switched to DoNext raise on average 40% more. Book a free strategy meeting and demo.

contact.title: Want to see DoNext in action?
contact.desc: Book a personal demo or send us a question — we'll get back to you within hours.

form.name: Full Name
form.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

footer.brandText: DoNext — The operating system for smart fundraising.
